scripts.electron:dist: npm run fetch:ffmpeg && npm run bump && npm run build && electron-builder && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const pkg = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('./package.json')); fs.copyFileSync('dist-electron/ZIPTV-Pro-Setup-' + pkg.version + '.exe', 'latest.exe');"
scripts.electron:dist:codecs: npm run fetch:ffmpeg && npm run build && electron-builder --config.electronDist=electron-codecs/dist --config.electronVersion=42.4.0 && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const pkg = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('./package.json')); fs.copyFileSync('dist-electron/ZIPTV-Pro-Setup-' + pkg.version + '.exe', 'latest.exe');"
scripts.apk: npm run bump && npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug && cd .. && copy /Y android\app\build\outputs\apk\debug\app-debug.apk app.apk && copy /Y app.apk ZIPTV-Pro.apk && echo APK ready: app.apk + ZIPTV-Pro.apk
